name: Ragie
description: Fully managed RAG-as-a-Service platform handling document ingestion, chunking, indexing and retrieval across multimodal data for AI apps.

seo.title: Ragie — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Ragie: Fully managed RAG-as-a-Service platform handling document ingestion, chunking, indexing and retrieval across multimodal data for AI apps.

when_to_use: Adding RAG to any app via a managed retrieval API
Ingesting and indexing documents without building chunking pipelines
Serving contextually relevant chunks to LLMs through REST API
Replacing custom vector pipeline with a fully managed retrieval layer

pros: Multimodal support for PDFs, video, audio
Good DX with SDKs and webhooks
Scales without self-hosted vector DB ops
review.verdict: A strong managed RAG pick if you value speed over control; heavy customizers still prefer LlamaIndex plus a vector DB.
review.best_for: AI app teams shipping RAG features quickly without infra work
review.not_for: Teams wanting deep control over chunking and retrieval logic

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
